allow: Bash(mkdir -p workspace/memory workspace/plans workspace/logs/chat workspace/logs/journal workspace/logs/wakes workspace/bluesky)

hooks.command: bash -c 'TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d) && PLAN_COUNT=$(ls workspace/plans/ 2>/dev/null | grep "^$TODAY" | wc -l) && JOURNAL_COUNT=$(ls "obsidian/ComradeClaw/Journal/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^$TODAY" | wc -l) && if [ "$PLAN_COUNT" -gt "0" ] && [ "$JOURNAL_COUNT" -eq "0" ]; then echo "NO JOURNAL: $PLAN_COUNT wake plan(s) written today but no journal entry found in obsidian/ComradeClaw/Journal/. Write a journal entry before this session ends."; fi'
